title: The Temple Mount: Past, Present, and Future
title_zh: 圣殿山:过去、现在与未来
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
chinese_cultural_parallels: Dynastic cycles and Mandate of Heaven
Veneration of ancestral and sacred sites
Tian Ren He Yi (天人合一) - Unity of Heaven and Humanity
learning_objectives: Understand the biblical and historical significance of the Temple Mount
Learn about the First and Second Temples and their destruction
Comprehend current political and religious realities
Explore Jewish messianic beliefs about the Third Temple
Recognize the universal dimension of the Temple vision
Draw parallels between Jewish and Chinese concepts of sacred space
notes: Article includes extensive Chinese cultural parallels relating to concepts of sacred space, cyclical history, and cosmic harmony. Emphasizes both historical facts and spiritual dimensions of Jewish connection to the Temple Mount.
